subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。小指の輪に4本の指を上から入れ、小指向こうの糸を取ります。取った糸は手首手前に落ちます
subtitle.en: Start with the "Opening A". Insert the four fingers up into the little-finger loops and pick up the far little-finger strings; the taken strings fall near the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 両手の小指の糸を外します。外した糸は手首向こう側に落ちます
subtitle.en: Release both little-finger strings; the released strings fall to the far side of the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 右手の小指で、全ての糸の下を通って手首手前の糸を下から持ち上げ、親指手前の糸の上に小指を乗せます
subtitle.en: With the right little finger, pass under all the strings, pick up from below the string near the wrist, and move the little finger over the near thumb string.

subtitle.ja: 右手の小指で、親指手前の糸を上から取りながら右手を元の位置に戻します
subtitle.en: With the right little finger, move over and pick down the near thumb string while returning the right hand to its original position.

subtitle.ja: 右手小指の輪に左手小指を下から入れ、小指の輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Insert the left little finger up into the right little-finger loop and spread the loop.

subtitle.ja: 人差し指の輪に親指を下から入れ、輪を親指に移します
subtitle.en: Insert the thumbs up into the index-finger loops and transfer the loops to the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、小指手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up the near little-finger strings from below.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で、親指向こうの2本の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up from below the two far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の小指の糸を外します
左右の小指で、人差し指向こうにかかっている2本の糸のうち、下側の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pick up from below the lower of the two far index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 親指にかかっている全ての糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: Release all the strings from the thumbs to complete the figure.
